title: Qlog QUIC Transport Activity Verification
scope: Verify the qlog QUIC packet, UDP datagram, stream, and datagram movement event contracts.
verification_method: Contract tests and snapshot comparison for representative packet and data-path transitions.
preconditions: The qlog SpecTrace artifacts validate successfully under the repository's JSON validation script.
The recorded draft source revisions have not changed since the plan was authored.
procedure: Run scripts/Validate-SpecTraceJson.ps1 over the qlog canonical artifacts.
Run packet, datagram, stream, and movement contract tests.
Compare emitted snapshots for the packet and data-path event families.
Review any serialization drift before widening to migration and recovery.
expected_result: Packet, UDP datagram, stream, and datagram movement payloads match the recorded draft requirements and serialize through the core writer without special casing.
